acidConv00000000.name: Acid Conversion
acidConv00000000.description:
A portion of the damage dealt by strikes with this weapon is converted to Acid damage. The proportion converted depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 33% of damage converted

  • Tier 2: 66% of damage converted

  • Tier 3: 100% of damage converted

Playtest Notes

The infrastructure for splitting a single attack into multiple typed damage components does not yet exist. Until it does, all tiers of this affix convert 100% of the weapon's damage to Acid. Once multi-type damage is supported, lower tiers will convert only a fraction of the total damage, leaving the remainder as the weapon's original type.

acidDmg000000000.name: Acid Damage
acidDmg000000000.description:
Add Acid damage to strikes made with this weapon. The bonus damage is equal to 2 for each Tier of this suffix.

Playtest Notes

This bonus currently applies as flat additional damage of the weapon's existing damage type. In a future update, this will deal damage as Acid, checked against the target's Acid resistance separately.

acidRes000000000.name: Acid Resistance
acidRes000000000.description: Increase Acid resistance by 3 for each Tier of this prefix.

activating000000.name: Activating
activating000000.description: Grants the Replenish Action action, allowing the bearer to restore Action in moments of duress. The amount restored scales with the Tier of this prefix.

affixActivating.name: Replenish Action
affixActivating.description:
In moments of duress you can draw upon an additional reserve of Action from this item. The amount of Action restored depends on the Tier of this affix.

  • Tier 1: 1 Action

  • Tier 2: 2 Action

  • Tier 3: 3 Action

arcanaSkill00000.name: Arcana
arcanaSkill00000.description: Increase the Enchantment Bonus for Arcana skill checks by 1 for each Tier of this prefix.

arrowSpellcraft0.name: Arrow Spellcraft
arrowSpellcraft0.description: This item is imbued with the essence of Arrow spellcraft. While equipped, the bearer instinctively gains knowledge of the Arrow gesture, allowing them to compose spells using it even without having learned the gesture through a talent.

disguise00000000.name: Disguise
disguise00000000.description: Grants the Disguise action, allowing the bearer to assume an illusory appearance once per rest.

affixDisguise.name: Disguise
affixDisguise.description:
You assume an illusory appearance once per rest which alters your appearance as well as your attire. The illusion cannot alter your ancestry, but can change other aspects of your anatomy including your apparent gender. The item itself does not change in appearance and remains visible.

The illusion persists indefinitely and can be dismissed at-will. Once activated, this item cannot produce another illusion in this way until 24 hours have passed.

focusing00000000.name: Focusing
focusing00000000.description: Grants the Replenish Focus action, allowing the bearer to restore Focus in moments of duress. The amount restored scales with the Tier of this affix.

affixFocusing.name: Replenish Focus
affixFocusing.description:
In moments of duress you can withdraw an additional reserve of Focus from this item. The amount of Focus restored depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 4 Focus

  • Tier 2: 6 Focus

  • Tier 3: 8 Focus

frostPtcy0000000.description: Increase the Enchantment Bonus for spells using the Frost rune by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

gliding000000000.name: Gliding
gliding000000000.description: Grants the Gliding action, allowing the bearer to laterally glide during a fall. The gliding distance scales with the Tier of this prefix.

gliding.name: Gliding
gliding.description:
If used while Falling, you may laterally move a number of spaces from your initial location as you glide. The gliding distance depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 1 foot per 20 feet of descent.

  • Tier 2: 2 feet per 20 feet of descent.

  • Tier 3: 4 feet per 20 feet of descent.

You take no falling damage upon landing, nor are you rendered @Condition[prone].

guarding00000000.name: Guarding
guarding00000000.description: Increase Block defense by 1 for each Tier of this suffix.

hale000000000000.name: Hale
hale000000000000.description: Increase maximum Health by 6 for each Tier of this prefix.

keen000000000000.name: Keen
keen000000000000.description: Reduce the Critical Threshold needed to obtain a Critical Hit on a successful Strike. This threshold is reduced by 1 for each Tier of this affix.

luminary00000000.name: Luminary
luminary00000000.description: Gain boons to Composed actions that include an Inflection. The number of boons gained equals the Tier of this prefix. Only one Affix can provide this benefit.

luminous00000000.name: Luminous
luminous00000000.description: Grants the Activate Illumination action, allowing the bearer to shed an otherworldly light. The radius of light scales with the Tier of this affix.

affixLuminous.name: Activate Illumination
affixLuminous.description:
You speak the command word and the @ref[item.name]{item} kindles into a steady otherworldly glow. The radius of bright light shed depends on the Tier of this prefix, with an additional radius of dim light extending an equal distance beyond.

  • Tier 1: 20 feet of bright light, 40 feet of dim light.

  • Tier 2: 40 feet of bright light, 80 feet of dim light.

  • Tier 3: 60 feet of bright light, 120 feet of dim light.

The light persists until you dismiss the effect or remove the item.

medicineSkill000.description: Increase the Enchantment Bonus for Medicine skill checks by 1 for each Tier of this prefix.

mending000000000.name: Mending
mending000000000.description: Reduce the Wounds defense threshold by 1 for each Tier of this prefix, making the wearer easier to heal from wounds.

nonchalant000000.name: Nonchalant

reach00000000000.description: Extends the effective range of this weapon. Melee weapons gain +1 range per Tier. Ranged weapons gain +10 range per Tier.

undeadBane000000.description: This weapon is especially effective against Undead creatures. When making a Strike against a target of that creature type, the attacker gains bonus Boons equal to the Tier of this prefix.

unshakeable00000.name: Unshakeable
unshakeable00000.description: Strikes against your Health require a higher overflow to achieve a Critical Hit. The critical threshold is increased by 1 for each Tier of this prefix.

voidConv00000000.name: Void Conversion
voidConv00000000.description:
A portion of the damage dealt by strikes with this weapon is converted to Void damage. The proportion converted depends on the Tier of this prefix.

  • Tier 1: 33% of damage converted

  • Tier 2: 66% of damage converted

  • Tier 3: 100% of damage converted

Playtest Notes

The infrastructure for splitting a single attack into multiple typed damage components does not yet exist. Until it does, all tiers of this affix convert 100% of the weapon's damage to Void. Once multi-type damage is supported, lower tiers will convert only a fraction of the total damage, leaving the remainder as the weapon's original type.

voidDmg000000000.name: Void Damage
voidDmg000000000.description:
Add Void damage to strikes made with this weapon. The bonus damage is equal to 2 for each Tier of this suffix.

Playtest Notes

This bonus currently applies as flat additional damage of the weapon's existing damage type. In a future update, this will deal damage as Void, checked against the target's Void resistance separately.

voidRes000000000.name: Void Resistance
voidRes000000000.description: Increase Void resistance by 3 for each Tier of this prefix.

wardSpellcraft00.name: Ward Spellcraft
wardSpellcraft00.description: This item is imbued with the essence of Ward spellcraft. While equipped, the bearer instinctively gains knowledge of the Ward gesture, allowing them to compose spells using it even without having learned the gesture through a talent.

weaponPotency000.name: Potency
weaponPotency000.description: Adds an Enchantment Bonus to all Strikes which use this weapon based on the Tier of the affix.

wildernessSkill0.name: Wilderness
wildernessSkill0.description: Increase the Enchantment Bonus for Wilderness skill checks by 1 for each Tier of this prefix.
